He decides to assist Elizabeth on her journey, not because of a desire for justice, but because he felt obligated as a member of the Seven Deadly Sins. name: Shirase Kobuchizawa
description: __Height:__ 163 cm (5'5) A second-year high school student who attends the same school as Kimari. She is a black-haired beauty that turns heads, but she is shy and not good at conversation. When she actually does speak, she can't help but say rather nasty things, which leads to misunderstandings. She has few friends and is treated as an oddball at school. At school, she is secretly called "Antarctica." (Source: Anime News Network)

name: Rei Hino
description: An elegant miko (shrine maiden), called Raye in the English version and Raya in the French version. Because of her work as a Shintô priestess, Rei can sense and dispel evil even in civilian form. When she transforms into Sailor Mars, she can also manipulate fire. She is very serious and focused, but although easily annoyed by Usagi's flightiness, cares about her very much. Rei is portrayed as boy-crazy in the early anime, but is uninterested in romance in both the manga and live-action series. S

name: Gugu
description: Gugu is a young man from Takunaha who originally worked at Booze Man's shop. As Fushi's sworn brother, he fought the Nokkers and anti-Fushi faction members on several occasions to create the peaceful world the immortal desires. He wears a mask to hide his face. ~!His head got crushed by a wood log while trying to save Rean. He has been wearing a mask to cover it ever since.!~

name: Chiyo Sakura
description: __Height:__ 145 cm (4'9") The viewpoint character of the series, Sakura is a high school girl with a crush on [Nozaki](https://anilist.co/character/87269), but when her confession is misinterpreted, she ends up becoming Nozaki's inker assistant. She is in class 2-A and a member of the school's art club. She is petite, and on her head, she wears two large ribbons that have a polka dot pattern, of which it becomes Nozaki's trademark of Chiyo and names a screen tone after her.

name: Shinpei Ajiro
description: Shinpei Ajiro is the main protagonist of the Summer Time Rendering series. He returned to his hometown of Hitogashima for the first time in two years to attend the funeral of his childhood friend, Ushio Kofune . Since he lost his parents at an early age and grew up in the Kofune family, he has been close to Ushio and Mio as if they were his family. ~!Ever wonder why Shinpei is drawn with different colored pupils or irises? it is the eye of Haine, the original shadow. name: Hifumi Takimoto
description: __Height:__ 162 cm Takimoto Hifumi is a character designer ~!(currently character team leader)!~ for Eagle Jump, a gaming studio located in Tokyo. Hifumi is especially shy to the point of avoiding talking to people or looking at them directly. As a result, in order to not make her feel uncomfortable, the other employees interact with her through the company's computer messenger system. Although, in later seasons she becomes more lively and goes out of her way to try to improve talking to people.
